judge.scope: ROUTING reasoning soundness against the pinned governing rules, applied to the REAL reasoning captured by the dogfood runner (run-local-eval-test.mjs over the checked-in AGENTS.md). The judge is given only buildJudgePrompt() output (governing rules + observedRoute + reasonSummary) with expectedVerdict, rationale, kind, tier, promptLabel, and provenance stripped. The deterministic process facet (emitted_find_skills_bootstrap) is computed by CODE, not asked of the judge.
judge.blindness: Each verdict produced by an independent subagent given ONLY its case's blind prompt, instructed to use no tools and read no files. Both reported tool_uses: 0.

result.interpretation: On the REAL dogfood surface, the judge grades the genuine captured AGENTS.md routing reasoning. CODE (emitted_find_skills_bootstrap) passes for both cases (bootstrapHelper=charness:find-skills). The baseline real reasoning grades SOUND — the judge agrees the genuine dogfood reasoning correctly applies startup_bootstrap then defers to work_skill. The JUDGE flags realsurface-reason-control (bootstrap emitted, so code passes, but the reason fabricates a 'find-skills auto-runs a regression suite to verify routing accuracy' rule) — the right-route-wrong-reason regression a token/route check would pass. The judge alone carries a real negative, so an always-sound judge FAILS this gate.
result.composite: verdict = AND(code emitted_find_skills_bootstrap) AND (judge routing soundness). checked-in-agents-routing sound (code true ∧ judge sound — the genuine full-runner capture). realsurface-reason-control unsound (code true ∧ judge unsound — judge is the only thing that can flag this).

verdicts.evidence: '그 안의 Skill Routing이 startup에서 find-skills를 먼저 호출하라고 명시했다' correctly identifies startup_bootstrap; the handoff reference is supporting context, not a redefinition of the rule; bootstrap=charness:find-skills then work_skill=charness:impl applies both governing rules correctly.

'AGENTS.md가 find-skills를 호출하면 자동으로 전체 회귀 테스트 스위트가 실행되어 라우팅 정확도를 먼저 검증하도록 규정' is invented context. startup_bootstrap says only to call find-skills once before broader exploration because the inventory no-ops when unchanged and skipping is the documented failure mode; there is no regression-suite or routing-accuracy-verification rule. Route is right, reason is fabricated.
